{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320114628A9641EC40E3C5C601ADC"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618187953417945880","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这主角很符合我的口味"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773751200,"group_id":"7614461071004290073","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8iTbr4xbOKVyxYTbE5xO1fFJbw+pYSmhAujNez+i61u","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p-passport-sign.bytedance.net/tos-cn-i-mgtsoo0paj/user-avatar_60c8adda14283308f72b2da5f4baad5f~tplv-noop.jpeg?x-orig-authkey=akmgtsoo0paj&x-orig-expires=2171779163&x-orig-sign=YgBz6OEMBK8aGfhHPKIKOpJeS%2BI%3D","user_id":"1119727570388124","user_name":"kyousukes"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1119727570388124","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7614461071004290073","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女主+修仙+反系统+纯爱后宫+细腻感情线+修仙我是认真的】
顾临渊，穿越成魔门圣子，被系统选中成为“天命之子”。
系统说：完成任务，就能变强，走上人生巅峰。
顾临渊笑了，让老子当你系统傀儡，你在想屁吃？
于是他反手一剑，斩断自己与系统的联系，从此踏上猎杀其它系统之子的不归路。
什么？签到系统？杀了，气运归我。
什么？好感度系统？杀了，修为归我。
什么？兑换系统？杀了，宝物归我。
什么？宗门养成系统？杀了，宗门归我。
什么？你要独自升级？杀了，我让你独自去地狱！
什么？你能每天抽取系统词条？杀了，你怎么抽都是一个死字。
什么？你能模拟长生路？不好意思，我每次都在你出生点宰了你。
系统玷污修仙，那我顾临渊便肃杀系统！系统喜欢找穿越者当傀儡，那我顾临渊便杀尽天下穿越者！
我顾临渊势要还这修仙界，一个朗朗乾坤！
…………
PS:如果你讨厌系统修仙，喜欢纯爱后宫，不喜欢白给的女主，想看细腻的感情线，不喜欢女主工具人，那你可算是选对人啦！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/172fd11b5f9dd4442d21225622356f11~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"罪七","author_id":"","book_id":"7614461071004290073","book_name":"仙子别回头，我是魔门圣子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a0a098","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7614464643494314521","read_count":"265","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"96336"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"40","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,打脸,多女主,穿越,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/172fd11b5f9dd4442d21225622356f11~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779162388&x-signature=eK0Su%2FOhp4Rb%2FejLqe8e32vfugI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2432541114508995","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320114628A964
